view.title: Yearly planner
viewSwitcher.title: Choose view
viewSwitcher.monthlyGridDesc: Browse the month as a calendar
viewSwitcher.monthlyListDesc: Review the month day by day
viewSwitcher.dailyDesc: Plan the day on a timeline
viewSwitcher.threeDayDesc: Compare three days on one timeline
monthlyDaySheet.title: {date} notes
header.cyclePlannerViewHint: Cycles: yearly calendar → month grid → month list → daily → 3 days → yearly
header.expandYearlyCellsHint: Widen yearly planner cells so plans are easier to read
header.collapseYearlyCellsHint: Return yearly planner cells to their default width
header.clickToEnterMonthYear: Click to enter month and year
modal.displayTitleHint: For planner file names (date or range), the title becomes the name suffix. Otherwise it is saved as frontmatter title.
modal.titleRenameConflict: A file with that name already exists; title was not changed.
modal.suffixAsTitle: Suffix is used as the file title (#)
modal.eventTimeDesc: Shown on the chip and saved separately from the reminder.
modal.endTimeRequiresStart: Enter a start time before setting an end time.
modal.endTimeBeforeStart: End time must be on or after start time.
modal.notifyTimeDesc: Local time on the event day (saved as notify_minutes in frontmatter). Leave empty for no reminder.
modal.repeatDesc: Choose a calendar basis and repeat every N days, weeks, months, or years.
modal.repeatIntervalDesc: Enter a whole number from 1 to 999 for every N days, weeks, months, or years.
modal.repeatIntervalInvalid: Repeat interval must be a whole number from 1 to 999.
modal.repeatUntilDateDesc: Optional. The final occurrence can fall on this date.
modal.repeatUntilBeforeStart: The repeat end date must be on or after the start date.
modal.chipColorTitle: Chip color (hex, rgb, or color name)
modal.dateChangeConflict: A file already exists for that date.
modal.invalidDateFileName: Use a valid date file name, such as 2026-02-27 or 2026-02-27-meeting.
modal.invalidRangeFileName: Use a valid range file name, such as 2026-02-27--2026-03-01 or 2026-02-27--2026-03-01-trip.
modal.invalidDateRange: End date must be on or after start date.
modal.invalidMonthYear: Enter a month from 1 to 12 and a year from 1900 to 2100.
modal.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
settings.plannerFolderDesc: Default folder for new planner notes, and the folder used when scan scope is limited.
settings.plannerFileScopeDesc: Choose whether Diary finds planner notes across the whole vault or only inside the planner folder.
settings.monthLabelsDesc: Display format for month headers (1월–12월 or Jan–Dec)
settings.showHolidaysDesc: Display public holidays in the yearly planner
settings.alternateCalendarDesc: Choose one alternate calendar label to show in planner views.
settings.calendarOverlayDesc: Show one extra calendar label in planner views. Custom calendars keep normal YYYY-MM-DD files.
settings.calendarOverlayModeDesc: Choose one built-in alternate calendar or one custom profile to show as the secondary planner label.
settings.customCalendarsDesc: Create local calendar profiles for fantasy worlds or campaign calendars.
settings.customCalendarEmpty: No custom calendars yet. Create one when a world or campaign needs its own month and weekday structure.
settings.customCalendarFilesStayGregoria: Planner notes still use normal YYYY-MM-DD filenames; overlays only change the extra label shown in the planner.
settings.customCalendarPreviewUnavailabl: Preview appears after the profile is valid.
settings.customCalendarEpochSectionDesc: Anchor one Gregorian date to one date in the custom calendar.
settings.customCalendarStructureDesc: Define the month lengths and weekday cycle used to calculate labels.
settings.customCalendarShortNameDesc: Used in compact planner cells and dropdown labels.
settings.customCalendarEpochDateDesc: The real-world date that matches the custom date below.
settings.customCalendarEpochWeekdayDesc: Use a 1-based weekday number from the weekday list below.
settings.customCalendarMonthsDesc: One per line: name | short name | days
settings.customCalendarWeekdaysDesc: One per line: name | short name
settings.externalCalendarsDesc: Show webcal:// or .ics events as read-only overlays. Diary does not create Markdown notes until you choose an event and create one.
settings.externalCalendarReadOnlyNote: External calendar events use a dashed style and do not create vault files until you choose an event and create a Markdown note.
settings.externalCalendarAddDesc: Add a published iCalendar feed URL.
settings.externalCalendarRefreshAllDesc: Refresh every enabled external calendar feed now.
settings.externalCalendarAutoRefreshDesc: Unless set to manual only, Diary refreshes once when Obsidian starts or the plugin reloads, then refreshes after the selected interval.
settings.externalCalendarUrlDesc: Use a webcal:// URL or an https:// .ics URL.
settings.externalCalendarUrlInvalid: Use a webcal:// or https:// calendar URL.
settings.externalCalendarConnectionSecti: Set the URL Diary fetches plus the name and color shown in planner views.
settings.externalCalendarSyncSectionDesc: Choose what to fetch and how often Diary should refresh this feed.
settings.externalCalendarDisplaySectionD: Choose which planner surfaces should show this feed.
settings.externalCalendarPrivacy: Secret iCal URLs can grant calendar access to anyone with the link. Diary stores the URL in local plugin data, which may sync with your vault.
settings.mobileBottomPaddingDesc: Padding (rem) at bottom of yearly planner on mobile so the table is not covered by the tools tab. 0 to disable.
settings.mobileCellWidthDesc: Width (rem) of month cells on mobile. 0 to use default (4.5rem / 4rem by breakpoint).
monthlyListFilter.label: Monthly list filter
chipDrag.targetExists: A file already exists for that date.
plannerClipboard.emptyCopy: Nothing to copy — select a date or note with Cmd/Ctrl+click.
plannerClipboard.copyFailed: Could not copy to Diary clipboard.
plannerClipboard.pasteInvalid: No planner notes have been copied in Diary yet.
plannerClipboard.pasteNoTarget: Select at least one date (Cmd/Ctrl+click) before pasting.
plannerClipboard.pasteMultiConflict: Paste either one copied note to multiple dates, or multiple notes to a single date.
plannerClipboard.pasteFailed: Could not paste copied planner notes.
plannerClipboard.deleteNothing: No notes to delete in the current selection.
plannerClipboard.deleteConfirmDesc:
{count} file(s) will be moved to the trash:

{paths}
plannerClipboard.undoNothing: No planner paste to undo in this view.
plannerClipboard.undoSuccess: Undo paste: moved {count} note(s) to trash.
plannerClipboard.undoMissingFiles: Undo paste: those files are no longer at the saved paths.
externalEvent.readOnlyHint: This event comes from an external calendar. Create a Markdown note only if you want to keep notes for it in your vault.
recurrence.virtualHint: This repeat occurrence is only a planner preview. Create a Markdown note when you want to add content to it.
recurrence.createSuccess: Created the repeat occurrence as a Markdown note.
externalEvent.createSuccess: Created Markdown note from external event.
